# Elite Global Properties

> Elite Global Properties L.L.C is a RERA-registered Dubai real-estate brokerage (RERA ORN 49515, DED Trade Licence 1480505, Trakheesi permit 1036983257) based at Office 1609-23, The Binary Tower by Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE. We give overseas and resident buyers private, direct-from-developer access to off-plan villas, townhouses and branded apartments in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, from developers including Emaar, Beyond, Sobha Realty and Aldar. Advisory in English, French, Russian, Arabic and German. Contact: +971 56 932 8155 (phone and WhatsApp), info@eliteglobal.ae. Entry prices are shown where the developer has confirmed them; full price lists, payment plans and availability are shared on request.

## Key pages
- [Buy Property in Dubai](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/buy-property-in-dubai.html): Buy property in Dubai off-plan, direct from the developer. Branded, freehold residences for foreign investors. Get the current price list on WhatsApp.
- [Off-Plan Property in Dubai](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/off-plan-property-in-dubai.html): Off-plan property in Dubai from Emaar, Beyond, Sobha Realty and Aldar. New launches with flexible payment plans and escrow protection. Request the price list.
- [Villas & Townhouses in Dubai](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/villas-and-townhouses-in-dubai.html): Buy an off-plan villa or townhouse in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, direct from the developer. Emaar Mareva villas, Palace Hillside townhouses and Sobha City. Get the price list.
- [Dubai Real Estate Investment & Golden Visa](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/dubai-real-estate-investment.html): Dubai real estate investment for overseas buyers: freehold ownership, off-plan entry prices and the UAE Golden Visa. Independent, numbers-first advice.
- [Apartments for Sale in Dubai](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/apartments-for-sale-in-dubai.html): Luxury and branded apartments for sale in Dubai, from 1-bedroom homes to penthouses and beach mansions. Off-plan, direct from the developer.
- [Dubai Off-Plan Projects](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/projects.html): Current off-plan launches from Beyond, Emaar, Sobha Realty and Aldar: BELLA, Kanyon, HADO, Mareva, Palace Hillside, Address Zabeel, Avarra, Sobha City and Al Ghadeer Gardens.

## Current off-plan developments
- [BELLA by PASSO](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/bella.html): Beyond, 2 to 6 bedrooms residences, penthouses and beach mansions, Palm Jumeirah, West Crescent, off-plan.
- [Kanyon by Beyond](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/kanyon.html): Beyond, 1 to 3 bedrooms waterfront apartments and homes, Forest District, Dubai Maritime City, off-plan.
- [HADO by Beyond](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/hado.html): Beyond, 1 to 4 bedrooms residences, duplexes and simplex homes, Siora masterplan, Island B, Dubai Islands, off-plan.
- [Mareva at The Oasis](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/mareva.html): Emaar, 4 to 6 bedrooms villas, The Oasis, Dubai, off-plan.
- [Palace Residences Hillside](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/palace-hillside.html): Emaar, 1 to 3 bedrooms branded apartments and townhouses, Dubai Hills Estate, off-plan.
- [Address Residences Zabeel](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/address-zabeel.html): Emaar, 1 to 3 bedrooms address-branded apartments and penthouses, Zabeel District, Dubai, off-plan.
- [Avarra by Palace](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/avarra.html): Emaar, 1 to 4 bedrooms palace-branded apartments, Business Bay, Dubai, off-plan, from AED 2.7M.
- [Sobha City, Abu Dhabi](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/sobha-city.html): Sobha Realty, 3 to 6 bedrooms villas, townhouses and apartments, Sobha City, Abu Dhabi, off-plan.
- [Al Ghadeer Gardens](https://eliteglobal-properties.com/project/al-ghadeer-gardens.html): Aldar, 2 to 4 bedrooms townhouses and villas, Al Ghadeer, Abu Dhabi, off-plan, from AED 2M.
